results.rendered_html: vi-naśana n. utter loss, perishing, disappearance (with sarasvatyāḥ N. of a district north-west of Delhi [said to be the same as Kuru-kṣetra and adjacent to the modern Paniput] where the river Sarasvatī is lost, in the sand; also sarasvatī-vin˚),  PañcavBr. ;  ŚrS.
